title: ScientificConclusionCandidate
description: A judged finding promoted to a candidate scientific conclusion for rubric evaluation.

artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for this candidate (typically the finding_id).

content.description: The textual content of the finding/conclusion.

structured_data.description: Parsed structured data (metric, value, unit, etc.).

provenance_quote.description: Verbatim quote from source text supporting this conclusion.

provenance_page.description: Page number of the provenance quote.

provenance_section.description: Section header where the provenance quote was found.

evidence_refs.description: IDs of supporting verification_results or confidence_scores.

confidence_context.description: Confidence scoring context from the judge phase.
